Commercial kitchen logistics: safely relocating a high-volume cafe or bistro near Bole Medhanialem

Bole Medhanialem corridor cafes serve volume—espresso lines, combi ovens, walk-in prep—commercial kitchen relocation is technician-led rigging plus hygiene discipline not dish box mentality. High-traffic location means night move and recommission before morning commuter queue.

This guide relocates high-volume cafes and bistros near Bole Medhanialem.

Kitchen equipment tiers

  • Gas range disconnect licensed plumber.
  • Combi oven upright transport bolts OEM.
  • Refrigeration drained upright.
  • Grease trap cleaned sealed transport.
  • Dishwasher water lines capped labeled.

Health and licensing

Food license address update; inspection slot new premises; deep clean both sites; pest control certificate some landlords require.

Traffic and access Medhanialem

Morning peak brutal—load 4-7 a.m. or post-10 p.m.; shuttle if curb illegal; compound delivery bay book if podium retail.

Inventory food stock

Perishable consume donate before move; dry stock sealed; no open oil transport leak.

Active Movers commercial kitchen

Technician coordination client arranges; rigging quote weights; night crew premium line-item.

Conclusion

Medhanialem cafe kitchen moves need OEM disconnect, night window, health parallel track, grease discipline—high-volume bistro reopens when espresso pulls clean not greasy truck smell.
author: Active Movers Team
